projectDescription: A browser-based image generation and editing tool powered by OpenAI's image APIs, with local-first data storage, rich parameter controls, and history management.
keyFeatures: Text-to-image generation via OpenAI Images API and Responses API
Reference image editing with up to 16 input images (file, paste, drag-and-drop)
Smart size selector with 1K/2K/4K presets and custom dimensions with auto-normalization
Fine-grained parameter controls: quality, output format, compression, moderation
Waterfall-layout task history with search, filtering, favorites, and multi-select
Iterative editing by promoting generated outputs back to input images
Local-first storage using IndexedDB with SHA-256 image deduplication
ZIP-based data export and import with raw image files and manifest
PWA support for installable app experience on desktop and mobile
Codex CLI compatibility mode for non-standard API endpoints
Responsive design with desktop and mobile optimized interactions
URL query parameter configuration for bookmarks and sharing
publicApiSurface: GET /?apiUrl=&apiKey=&apiMode=&codexCli= (URL query params for pre-filling config)
POST /v1/images/edits (Images API - image editing with reference images)
VITE_DEFAULT_API_URL (build-time environment variable for default API endpoint)
API_URL (Docker runtime environment variable for default API endpoint)
